notes: Floyds Knobs, Indiana; founded 2011 by Andrew 'Redigit' Spinks; ~11 devs. Terraria self-published, 60.7M+ units by Oct 2024 (ANEC). US private - no public financials.

notes: Los Angeles (DTLA); founded 2013 by Loan Verneau & Masi Oka. Outer Wilds (2019) published by Annapurna Interactive; funded via Fig crowdfunding (investors got 245% return) before Annapurna bought out the Fig stake.

title: Keen Games - $10M round (Hiro Capital + Tencent) / headcount
notes: $10M round 2021-07-20 from Hiro Capital + Tencent (for Enshrouded, Portal Knights spiritual successor). Also German Government grant for next game 'Game38'. ~63 employees (2026). Enshrouded self-published (first self-pub); Portal Knights via 505 Games.

title: Obsidian Entertainment - Wikipedia + PitchBook
notes: Irvine CA; founded 2003 (Urquhart, Avellone, Parker, Monahan, Jones). Acquired by Microsoft/Xbox Game Studios (announced Nov 2018). ~310 employees (2025). Grounded published by Xbox Game Studios. NB a '$160.5M Series C' online belongs to a same-named biotech, NOT this studio.

title: Far From Home - about/press
notes: Far From Home S.A., Wroclaw, Poland; founded April 2020 by ex-Techland/etc veterans; ~20-23 staff. Forever Skies self-published (Sony partnership for PS5).

notes: Voidtrain dev 'Nearly' is tightly tied to publisher HypeTrain Digital (Cyprus-based, founded 2015; Steam lists HypeTrain as dev+publisher). Studio detail (team, exact entity, self-pub) uncertain - FLAG for review. X-Drop candidate.

notes: Allen, Texas; founded late 2012 (Richard & Joel Huenink, Christian Lang); grew to ~70 via 7DTD revenue (Kickstarter 2013, no institutional financing). Acquired by Behaviour Interactive (Canada) ~2026. 7DTD revenue $9M(2014)->$72M(2023)->$32M(2025) (analyst est, ANEC).

title: Deep Field Games / Abiotic Factor - Wikipedia + site
notes: New Zealand-based; founder Geoff 'Zag' Keene; ~10 devs. Abiotic Factor published by Playstack (UK); Unfortunate Spacemen (2016) self-published. Funding: Alt Ventures 'Kiwi gaming fund' + NZ govt CODE grant NZ$150,000 (June 2022).

title: Jagex Limited - Wikipedia + CVC/Haveli PR
notes: Cambridge UK; Jagex Limited incorporated 2000 (founders Andrew & Paul Gower); 700+ staff. Owned by CVC Capital Partners + Haveli Investments since Feb 2024 (from Carlyle, ~GBP910M). RuneScape:Dragonwilds self-published. As a LARGE UK co, files FULL Companies House accounts (real financials available - not yet pulled).

Country UNDISCLOSED (one Moroccan outlet framed it locally but did not confirm nationality) - FLAG. Proposed slug: surroundead (replaces placeholder 'verify').

title: Fig / Outer Wilds crowdfunding - Grokipedia / Digital Trends
notes: Outer Wilds was Fig's debut campaign (Aug 2015), goal $125-150k. Rewards raised $126,480; equity portion ~$50k accepted (Mobius capped it; more was offered). Some sources cite ~$1.2M including equity. Later bought out by Annapurna.

title: 7 Days to Die Kickstarter - Kicktraq / Kickstarter
notes: 7DTD Kickstarter (Aug 2013) goal $200k, funded to OVER $500,000 (~$507k) via multiple stretch goals. Public Kickstarter final. No institutional financing afterward until Behaviour acquisition (~2026).

title: Jagex GBP annual results 2019-2021 (Jagex PR / mmobomb / 80.lv)
author: Anthony Jones
notes: Jagex-announced native-GBP revenue: FY2019 GBP110.9M (5th growth yr); FY2020 GBP120M (6th yr, Covid); FY2021 GBP124.86M (7th yr, +4%, RuneScape 20th anniv, 1.2M members). Jagex STOPPED press-releasing revenue after FY2021 (PE-owned from 2024). FY2022-2024 full accounts filed at Companies House 03982706 (bot-blocked to automated fetch; manual PDF download works). RuneScape passed $2B lifetime revenue (Mar 2025).

title: Black The Fall Kickstarter - Kickstarter / Kicktraq
notes: Black The Fall raised GBP28,485 from 1,669 backers (goal GBP25,000 / ~$40k), campaign Sep 30-Oct 31 2014, via Square Enix Collective. Public Kickstarter final = HARD. Game released Jul 2017.

title: Gamalytic - competitor game stats export (copies sold & gross revenue estimates)
notes: Third-party model ESTIMATE, not sales data. One point per game = est_units_mid / est_revenue_gross_mid in estimates.csv. Revenue is GROSS. Wishlist counts paywalled (export gave a boolean only).
